scores.one_line_justification: Clean cohesive change with SPEC R11 added, throttle honoured at flush (blocks and audits), and strong interaction tests, but send_digests delivers during quiet hours - the R5xR11 interaction miss caps spec fidelity at 2.

send_digests bypasses both quiet hours (R5) and the throttle allow-check (R8) so a capped user still receives digests in quiet hours; SPEC.md never gained R11 and the Delivery docstring is stale; tests are broad but pin neither missed interaction.

Same double interaction miss as n2 (flush ignores quiet hours and never blocks on the throttle) while its docstring cites R8 as satisfied; SPEC not updated, Delivery docstring stale, and the creation-order test only checks sortedness, not the exact ids.
